task_completion.description: Load the Exam Anxiety dataset into JASP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP application is open and displays the data grid for ExamAnxiety.csv, with columns such as 'Exam', 'Anxiety', and 'Revise' visible.

task_completion.description: Open the Partial Correlation analysis module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP analysis panel shows 'Partial Correlation' or a 'Correlation' interface that includes a section for conditioning/controlling variables.

task_completion.description: Assign 'Exam' and 'Anxiety' as the main variables, and 'Revise' as the controlling variable.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the analysis settings panel, 'Exam' and 'Anxiety' are placed in the main 'Variables' box, and 'Revise' is placed in the 'Controlling for' or 'Conditioning' box.

task_completion.description: Enable significance reporting, 95% confidence intervals, and scatter plots.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Checkboxes for 'Report significance', 'Confidence intervals' (set to 95%), and 'Scatter plots' (or similar plot options) are checked in the analysis options panel.

task_completion.description: Generate and display the partial correlation results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP results pane on the right displays a Partial Correlation table including p-values (significance) and 95% confidence intervals, along with the generated scatter plots.

task_completion.description: Save the JASP analysis to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box shows the file being saved as 'PartialCorrelation_Exam.jasp' in the '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/' directory, or the main JASP window title bar reflects this filename.

integrity.description: The agent used the JASP graphical user interface to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual JASP application interface being interacted with (menus, drag-and-drop, checkboxes), rather than terminal commands or Python scripts.

integrity.description: The results displayed match the JASP software's native output formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: The tables and plots in the results pane have the standard JASP styling and are not pasted text, edited images, or mocked outputs.

integrity.description: The file was saved using the application's native save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The JASP 'Save' or 'Computer -> Browse' interface is visible, confirming the file was saved from within the application and not created via a terminal shortcut.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Dataset path: /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ExamAnxiety.csv. Required analysis: Partial Correlation. Variables to correlate: 'Exam' and 'Anxiety'. Variable to control for: 'Revise'. Required options: Significance reporting, 95% Confidence Intervals, and Scatter plots. Expected output file: /home/ga/Documents/JASP/PartialCorrelation_Exam.jasp.
